title: A1 Básico - Aplicado
intro: The student is able to understand and use familiar words and very simple expressions in everyday situations, identifying the topic and main information with visual support. They interact in a simple way in daily contexts, using very basic sentences to communicate essential needs. They produce short sentences that convey overall meaning, partially addressing the topic and required text type, despite frequent spelling and grammatical errors. Vocabulary is limited but sufficient to communicate the essential message, with influence from their first language.
objectives: Fluent reading and comprehension of varied texts
Writing composed paragraphs and short narratives
Application of Portuguese language in real situations
